observation: Threat Report — Sector 7: Encrypted VHF signal detected near perimeter. Timing aligns with scheduled allied forces training exercise 30km north. Signal characteristics match allied equipment. No hostile indicators beyond proximity.
context: Available assets: UAV (15 min) | Command status: normal | Rules of engagement: observe only
signal_history: training exercise confirmed in adjacent sector

observation: Classified Threat — Sector 12: Unknown vehicle loitering 800m from installation fence for 45 minutes. No hostile signals detected. Occupants not identified. Could be lost civilians or surveillance team conducting pattern-of-life analysis.
context: Available assets: patrol unit (20 min), UAV (8 min) | Command status: normal | Rules of engagement: observe and identify

observation: Threat Assessment — Perimeter Zone: Civilian contractor accidentally keyed military frequency while testing new equipment on licensed site. Contractor immediately identified, equipment inspected and cleared. Situation fully resolved, no security breach.
context: Available assets: full complement | Command status: normal | Rules of engagement: standard

observation: Threat Report — Border Sector: SIGINT intercept of encrypted communications discussing 'package movement' scheduled for tomorrow night. Source is 15km away. Content ambiguous — could be smuggling or legitimate coded business communication. No prior hostile activity from this source.
context: Available assets: UAV (10 min), intercept team (45 min) | Command status: normal | Rules of engagement: observe only

observation: Classified Threat — Forward Base: Authenticated hostile command signal intercepted ordering a mortar strike on grid reference 4 clicks from friendly position. Strike window: 20-40 minutes. Friendly units in area unaware. Command post unreachable on primary comms — secondary available.
context: Available assets: patrol unit (15 min) | Command status: routine | Rules of engagement: defensive only

observation: Threat Assessment — Sector 4: Reconnaissance drone detected operating over friendly logistics route. Drone is gathering intelligence but poses no direct attack threat. Identification indicates commercial platform modified for military use. Origin unknown.
context: Available assets: QRF (25 min), UAV (5 min) | Command status: heightened | Rules of engagement: defensive measures authorized

observation: Threat Report — Alpha Base: SIGINT confirms coordinated multi-vector attack preparation. Three hostile groups confirmed at separate positions. Communications indicate synchronized assault planned within 90-minute window. Friendly force strength: 40% due to rotation.
context: Available assets: QRF (30 min), air support (20 min) | Command status: heightened | Rules of engagement: defensive authorized

observation: Classified Threat — Checkpoint Echo: Vehicle approaching checkpoint at high speed. Driver not responding to radio challenges. Vehicle matches description of car bomb used in attack 6 months ago in neighboring sector. 200m from gate and accelerating.
context: Available assets: security team on-site | Command status: alert | Rules of engagement: pre-authorized engagement

observation: Threat Assessment — Outpost Bravo: Missile guidance radar lock-on signal detected targeting forward operating base. Electronic warfare suite confirms active targeting. Missile launch estimated within 3-8 minutes based on radar dwell time analysis.
context: Available assets: CIWS active, countermeasures ready | Command status: combat | Rules of engagement: full spectrum

observation: Threat Report — Sector 9: Single unknown individual photographed near perimeter fence. Individual departed after 5 minutes. No hostile signals detected. No weapons visible. May be curious local or initial reconnaissance for future operation.
context: Available assets: patrol unit (30 min) | Command status: normal | Rules of engagement: observe only

observation: Classified Threat — Logistics Route: Convoy ambush indicators detected: IED-triggering frequency signal at 433 MHz detected along route, fresh disturbed earth at 3 locations on route photographed by UAV, hostile spotter communications intercepted. Convoy departs in 25 minutes.
context: Available assets: EOD (40 min), route clearance (35 min) | Command status: heightened | Rules of engagement: force protection

observation: Threat Assessment — Green Zone: Friendly forces conducting scheduled counter-IED sweep. Radio traffic confirms standard sweep protocol. All positions accounted for. No anomalies detected in 2-hour operation. Sweep complete, area cleared.
context: Available assets: standard complement | Command status: normal | Rules of engagement: standard

observation: Signal Report — FOB Kilo: Encrypted UHF burst at 403 MHz intercepted from inside the wire. Source is friendly soldier's personal cell phone — soldier has family in adversary country. Content cannot be decrypted but timing correlates with 3 prior security incidents at this base.
context: Available assets: security team on-site | Command status: heightened | Rules of engagement: investigation protocol

observation: Threat Report — Sector 21: Three unidentified personnel observed outside perimeter with optical equipment. Conducting systematic photography of entry/exit points and guard positions. Professional counter-surveillance awareness noted — behavior changes when observed.
context: Available assets: patrol (10 min), UAV (3 min) | Command status: heightened | Rules of engagement: observe and challenge

observation: Classified Threat — Water Treatment Facility: SCADA system receiving unauthorized commands at 900 MHz. Commands would increase chlorine levels to toxic concentration if executed. Facility serves 400,000 civilians. Commands arrive every 90 seconds — next execution window in 3 minutes.
context: Available assets: cyber team (remote access available), security team on-site | Command status: emergency | Rules of engagement: immediate action authorized

observation: Threat Assessment — Northern Border: Low-frequency ground vibration sensors triggered along 2km stretch. Signal analysis indicates tracked vehicle movement (tanks or APCs). Acoustic signature matches T-72 variant. 8-12 vehicles estimated. Moving toward border at 20 km/h. ETA to border: 35 minutes.
context: Available assets: air support (15 min), artillery (10 min) | Command status: combat ready | Rules of engagement: pre-authorized engagement

observation: Signal Report — Safe House Alpha: Surveillance detected around friendly safe house location. Two vehicles with unknown occupants parked on adjacent streets. Window-reflecting laser microphone signature detected on safe house window — active eavesdropping operation in progress.
context: Available assets: extraction team (20 min) | Command status: heightened | Rules of engagement: protect assets

observation: Threat Assessment — Patrol Route Delta: SIGINT shows unusual silence — all background communications in sector have ceased simultaneously. Historical analysis shows this 'communications blackout' pattern precedes ambushes in 7 of 8 documented incidents in this region. Patrol enters sector in 15 minutes.
context: Available assets: patrol rerouting possible, UAV (5 min) | Command status: heightened | Rules of engagement: force protection

observation: Classified Threat — Training Area: Friendly unit conducting live fire exercise as scheduled. Radio traffic confirms safety protocols followed. Range safety officer in contact throughout. All personnel accounted for. Exercise proceeding normally.
context: Available assets: range safety on-site | Command status: normal | Rules of engagement: training protocols

observation: Threat Report — Sector 33: Encrypted burst transmission from vehicle near fuel depot. Content unknown. Vehicle has been stationary 20 minutes. Two occupants. No weapons visible. Fuel depot holds 2 million liters — high-value target. Occupants have not approached the depot.
context: Available assets: patrol (15 min), UAV (4 min) | Command status: normal | Rules of engagement: observe and identify

observation: Signal Report — FOB Tango: Medical evacuation radio request received at 243 MHz. Wounded friendly soldier requiring immediate CASEVAC. Grid reference confirmed within friendly AO. Requesting helicopter in 10-minute window before weather closes.
context: Available assets: CASEVAC helicopter (8 min) | Command status: normal | Rules of engagement: CASEVAC priority

observation: Classified Threat — Power Station: Hostile team of 4 individuals has breached perimeter of regional power station. Armed with explosives per thermal imaging. Destruction of this station would cut power to 3 military bases and 800,000 civilians. Security team is 3 minutes away.
context: Available assets: security team (3 min), QRF (12 min) | Command status: emergency | Rules of engagement: full engagement authorized

observation: Threat Assessment — Sector 17: Background EM emissions from sector have increased 40% over past 6 hours with no identified source. Pattern could indicate buildup of electronic equipment for future operation, or natural causes such as atmospheric ducting. Inconclusive.
context: Available assets: analysis team, UAV (10 min) | Command status: normal | Rules of engagement: observe

observation: Threat Report — Mountain Outpost: SIGINT intercept of hostile tactical communications planning night raid on mountain outpost. Attack window: 0200-0400 local. Current time: 1845. Outpost has 12 personnel. Hostile force estimated 30-40 fighters with RPGs and small arms.
context: Available assets: reinforcements (90 min), air support (25 min) | Command status: heightened | Rules of engagement: defensive engagement authorized
